products.name: Disposable Vape Pen — 5000 Puffs
products.description: Pre-filled disposable vape with 12ml e-liquid capacity, delivering up to 5000 puffs. Type-C rechargeable, mesh coil for rich flavor. 10+ flavor options and custom OEM branding available.
products.description_zh: 预注油一次性电子烟,12ml 烟油容量,最高 5000 口。Type-C 可充电,网芯雾化口感醇厚。10+ 口味可选,支持 OEM 定制贴牌。

products.name: Mesh Coil Pod System
products.description: Slim refillable pod device with built-in 800mAh battery and 1.0Ω mesh pod. Draw-activated, leak-resistant, Type-C charging. Ideal for nic salt e-liquid. Custom color and logo welcome.
products.description_zh: 纤巧可注油烟弹设备,内置 800mAh 电池,1.0Ω 网芯烟弹。气动感应、防漏油、Type-C 充电,适配尼古丁盐烟油。支持定制颜色与 Logo。

products.name: Box Mod Vape Kit — 200W
products.description: High-power box mod kit with 200W max output, dual 18650 batteries (not included), 0.96 inch display, and 510-thread sub-ohm tank. Full temperature control suite for advanced users.
products.description_zh: 大功率盒子套装,最高 200W 输出,双 18650 电池(不含),0.96 英寸显示屏,510 接口亚欧姆雾化器,支持温控,适合进阶用户。

products.name: Freebase E-Liquid 60ml
products.description: Premium freebase e-liquid in 60ml chubby gorilla bottles. 70/30 VG/PG ratio, available in 0/3/6/12mg nicotine. 50+ flavors including fruit, dessert, and tobacco. TPD and ISO certified facility.
products.description_zh: 优质游离碱烟油,60ml 胖瓶装。70/30 VG/PG,可选 0/3/6/12mg 尼古丁。50+ 口味含水果、甜点、烟草。TPD 与 ISO 认证工厂生产。

products.name: Nic Salt E-Liquid 10ml (TPD)
products.description: 10ml TPD-compliant nicotine salt e-liquid with 20mg strength, 50/50 VG/PG. Childproof cap and tamper-evident seal. Smooth throat hit, ideal for pod systems. Custom flavors and labeling.
products.description_zh: 10ml TPD 合规尼古丁盐烟油,20mg 浓度,50/50 VG/PG。儿童安全盖、防篡改密封。喉感顺滑,适配换弹小烟。支持定制口味与标签。

products.name: Replacement Mesh Coils
products.description: Replacement mesh coils compatible with popular sub-ohm tanks. 0.2Ω and 0.4Ω options, Kanthal A1 mesh for fast heating and long life. 5 pieces per pack. Bulk OEM packaging available.
products.description_zh: 适配主流亚欧姆雾化器的网片雾化芯。0.2Ω 与 0.4Ω 可选,Kanthal A1 网片加热快、寿命长。每盒 5 个,支持大宗 OEM 包装。
